x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Maintenance Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for updating or maintaining customer/product data

Comment:
Example:
Change of address requires identity verification

x-enumeration-literals.name: Modification Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions for changing product terms or features

Comment:
Example:
Credit limit increase requires credit reassessment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Closure Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for closing or terminating a product

Comment:
Example:
Account closure requires zero balance confirmation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspension Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions for temporarily disabling a product

Comment:
Example:
Card suspension allowed upon fraud suspicion

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dispute Handling Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Processes for handling customer disputes

Comment:
Example:
Card transaction dispute must be raised within 60 days

x-enumeration-literals.name: Complaint Handling Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Procedures for managing customer complaints

Comment:
Example:
Complaints must be resolved within 15 business days

x-enumeration-literals.name: Replacement Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for replacing lost or damaged products

Comment:
Example:
Lost debit card replacement requires identity check

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reinstatement Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions to restore a suspended product

Comment:
Example:
Account reinstated after fraud clearance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Adjustment Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for correcting or waiving fees

Comment:
Example:
Fee refund requires manager approval

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Request Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
General servicing request processing rules

Comment:
Example:
Address update processed via CRM workflow

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Authentication Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Identity verification rules during servicing

Comment:
Example:
MFA required before sensitive account changes

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Servicing Requirement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compliance obligations during servicing

Comment:
Example:
GDPR data deletion requests must be fulfilled within SLA
